heading: Issuance of cards or other means of access
label: 1693i Issuance of cards or other means of access
notes: Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the designated transfer date, see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 111–203section 1100H of Pub. L. 111–203section 552a of Title 5
amendments: Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the designated transfer date, see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 111–203section 1100H of Pub. L. 111–203section 552a of Title 5

children.text: in response to a request or application therefor; or
as a renewal of, or in substitution for, an accepted card, code, or other means of access, whether issued by the initial issuer or a successor.
such card, code, or other means of access is not validated;

such distribution is accompanied by a complete disclosure, in accordance with , of the consumer’s rights and liabilities which will apply if such card, code, or other means of access is validated;section 1693c of this title

such distribution is accompanied by a clear explanation, in accordance with regulations of the Bureau, that such card, code, or other means of access is not validated and how the consumer may dispose of such code, card, or other means of access if validation is not desired; and
such card, code, or other means of access is validated only in response to a request or application from the consumer, upon verification of the consumer’s identity.

children.heading: Validation
children.label: c Validation
children.text: For the purpose of subsection (b), a card, code, or other means of access is validated when it may be used to initiate an electronic fund transfer.
